summary: Tienda Column Feature Testing - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 6/6 pytest tests passed. Frontend: All 4 test scenarios verified (Ventas/Reservas x Order/Detail modes). The 'Tienda' (Store) column has been successfully added to the Ventas and Reservas tabs in the account detail panel.

console_warnings.issue: HTML hydration warning - <th> cannot be child of <span> - pre-existing issue, not related to Tienda feature

7. Frontend: Ventas tab ORDER mode - 'Tienda' column header and data displayed ✓
8. Frontend: Ventas tab DETAIL mode - 'Tienda' column header and data displayed ✓
9. Frontend: Reservas tab ORDER mode - 'Tienda' column header and data displayed ✓
10. Frontend: Reservas tab DETAIL mode - 'Tienda' column header and data displayed ✓
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: _TIENDA_JOIN and _TIENDA_EXPR constants properly defined in server.py (lines 1095-1114)
Backend: Tienda field uses COALESCE with CASE-based fallback for records without location_id
Frontend VentasTab.jsx: Tienda column properly added in both order and detail modes (lines 77, 109)
Frontend ReservasTab.jsx: Tienda column properly added in both order and detail modes (lines 76, 106)
Note: Créditos tab was NOT modified (correct per requirements - account_invoice_credit lacks location data)

test_account_used.reason: Has many sales and reservas for testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: Tienda column successfully added to Ventas and Reservas tabs. Backend uses _TIENDA_JOIN (LEFT JOIN to stock_location) and _TIENDA_EXPR (COALESCE with CASE fallback) for deriving tienda from pos_order.location_id. Frontend displays tienda values like GR238, GM207, BOOSH, TALLER, etc. Créditos tab intentionally excluded per requirements.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - no bugs found. Feature implemented correctly.
